subcodes.first_line: O Bashir-Ilahi! Thy letter was received, and from the events in Shiraz all were struck with astonishment at such grievous misfortune [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیرالهی نامه شما رسید از حوادث شیراز تعجب کل حاصل گردید که این چه بدبختی
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
